headline: Why Sweetgreen Stock Jumped 33% in April
summary: The return of risk-on sentiment helped push the fast-casual stock higher.

raw.headline: Why Sweetgreen Stock Jumped 33% in April
raw.summary: The return of risk-on sentiment helped push the fast-casual stock higher.

headline: Healthcare cost surge makes parental paid leave benefits a target for workplace cuts
summary: As healthcare costs soar and companies search for savings, generous paid parental leave is a benefit being cut, with recent examples from Zoom and Deloitte.

raw.headline: Healthcare cost surge makes parental paid leave benefits a target for workplace cuts
raw.summary: As healthcare costs soar and companies search for savings, generous paid parental leave is a benefit being cut, with recent examples from Zoom and Deloitte.
